1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1 km grid cells (id and geom) for spatial filtering

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for the national layer

4.description: filter grid cells to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

5.description: find grid cells (in municipality) that intersect stormflo 200-year polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per grid cell (group by id) to deduplicate multiple polygon matches

7.description: count distinct grid cells that intersect the stormflo polygons

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

args.sql:
SELECT id, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom IS NOT NULL
AND ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204')) = false
LIMIT 0;
